---
title: "INTRODUCTION TO THE ZEWWWW ECON TEMPLATE"
author:
  - name: "Lord Macbeth"
    affiliation: Thane of Glamis
  - name: "Lady Macbeth"
    affiliation: Queen of Scotland
event: "Dunsinane Hill"
presenter: "Simon" # Write name if it should appear on the bottom of every slide
date: today
date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
partner-logo: "partnerlogo.png" #Replace file in this folder to include another logo
totalnumber: false # Make true if total number of slides should be shown on bottom
chapter-signal: false # Make true if chapter overview and progress should be at bottom
section-slides: true # Make true to show section slides
format:
  zewwww-econ-beamer: default

english: yes
references: false 
bibliography: ../references.bib
biblio-style: apa #Select from https://www.overleaf.com/learn/latex/Biblatex_bibliography_styles  

add-tex: |
       \usepackage{lipsum}
   
editor: source
---


```{r Setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# Reload Setup s.t. everything renders as intended
library(here)
source(here("B_Prog/0setup.R"))
```

# INTRODUCTION
These are slides.
